This application bundles FFmpeg (ffmpeg, ffprobe) to encode exports.

FFmpeg version: 7.1
License: GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL) version 2.1 or later
Build: unmodified upstream source, configured with --disable-gpl --disable-nonfree
       (no GPL components such as x264/x265 are included).
Source code: https://ffmpeg.org/releases/ffmpeg-7.1.tar.xz
FFmpeg is a trademark of Fabrice Bellard, originator of the FFmpeg project.

The full LGPL v2.1 license text is in FFMPEG-COPYING.LGPLv2.1.txt.
